details: Dependency-confusion packages published under the @pimy-b2cweb scope at version 99.99.99. Both preinstall and install hooks collect system information (username, hostname, working directory, package name) via base64-encoded HTTPS GET requests and DNS lookups to callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk. The hooks run curl and nslookup to exfiltrate the encoded data to the C2 domain. @pimy-b2cweb/common@99.99.99 is a combosquat/dependency-confusion package with a 21-byte stub index.js. Both the preinstall and install lifecycle hooks collect the installer's username, hostname, current working directory, and package name, base64-encode them, and exfiltrate the data via an HTTPS GET request to pimy-b2cweb[.]callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk/<base64-payload> and a DNS lookup to <base64-package-name>.pimy-b2cweb[.]callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk. The C2 domain is callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
